steps.name: open assistant dialog first time
steps.exec: (() => { const button = [...document.querySelectorAll('button')].find((x) => x.querySelector('svg[viewBox="0 0 48 48"]') && !String(x.className || '').includes('ant-btn-text ant-btn-color-default ant-btn-variant-text ant-btn-sm')) ?? [...document.querySelectorAll('button')].find((x) => x.querySelector('svg[viewBox="0 0 48 48"]')); if (!button) throw new Error('Title-bar assistant button not found'); button.click(); return { clicked: true, className: String(button.className || '') }; })();

action.name: type
action.text: Please add a heading that says Golden Harness One.

steps.name: submit first assistant request
steps.exec: (() => { const button = [...document.querySelectorAll('button')].find((x) => (x.textContent || '').includes('Send to Codex')); if (!button) throw new Error('Send to Codex button not found'); button.click(); return { clicked: true }; })();

steps.name: wait floating dock after first request
capture first selected thread key
steps.exec: window.__assistantGolden = window.__assistantGolden || {}; const root = document.querySelector('[data-selectedThreadKey]'); const key = root?.getAttribute('data-selectedThreadKey') || ''; window.__assistantGolden.firstThreadKey = key; return { key, promptVisible: (document.body.innerText || '').includes('Please add a heading that says Golden Harness One.') };

steps.name: first thread key stored and first prompt visible

assert.code: const key = window.__assistantGolden?.firstThreadKey || ''; const body = document.body.innerText || ''; return !!key && body.includes('Please add a heading that says Golden Harness One.');

steps.name: assistant dialog closes after first submit
open assistant dialog second time
steps.exec: (() => { const button = [...document.querySelectorAll('button')].find((x) => x.querySelector('svg[viewBox="0 0 48 48"]') && !String(x.className || '').includes('ant-btn-text ant-btn-color-default ant-btn-variant-text ant-btn-sm')); if (!button) throw new Error('Title-bar assistant button not found on second open'); button.click(); return { clicked: true }; })();

action.name: type
action.text: Please add a final sentence that says Golden Harness Two.

steps.name: submit second assistant request
steps.exec: (() => { const button = [...document.querySelectorAll('button')].find((x) => (x.textContent || '').includes('Send to Codex')); if (!button) throw new Error('Send to Codex button not found on second submit'); button.click(); return { clicked: true }; })();

steps.name: capture second selected thread key
steps.exec: window.__assistantGolden = window.__assistantGolden || {}; window.__assistantGolden.secondThreadKey = document.querySelector('[data-selectedThreadKey]')?.getAttribute('data-selectedThreadKey') || ''; return { first: window.__assistantGolden.firstThreadKey || '', second: window.__assistantGolden.secondThreadKey || '' };

steps.name: second request reuses first thread key

assert.code: const first = window.__assistantGolden?.firstThreadKey || ''; const second = window.__assistantGolden?.secondThreadKey || ''; const body = document.body.innerText || ''; return !!first && first === second && body.includes('Please add a final sentence that says Golden Harness Two.');
